name: Avinguda de l'Estadi Final Climb
roadSegment: Avinguda de l'Estadi / final climb toward Cote du Stade Olympique de Montjuic
estimatedPassageTime: 17:23-19:13 local near Avinguda de l'Estadi; finish 17:26-19:16 local
summary: Close-to-finish uphill TTT option near the Olympic Stadium sector without committing to the most crowded finish-line barrier.
whyItMatters: The official schedule lists Avinguda de l'Estadi just before the final 0.8 km climb at 7%, so teams should be visibly under pressure but still moving slower than flat urban sections.

access.estimated_route_from_base: Approach on foot from Montjuic/Poble-sec or from higher Montjuic paths; exact route depends on closures.
access.parking_transit_possibilities: Transit/walking is preferable; parking feasibility unknown and likely poor inside Montjuic.
access.walk_bike_approach_notes: Bike/walk approach may work before closures, but spectator bike parking and crossing rules are unknown.
access.road_closure_notes: Unknown; local closure and security-perimeter plan required.

pros: Uphill final-sector viewing should slow the team formations.
Very close to the official final climb and finish timing.
Potentially easier to leave than a finish-line barrier if exits toward Poble-sec remain open.
cons: May fall inside a dense finish/technical/security area.
Public standing room could be heavily controlled or VIP-only near the Olympic Stadium.
High crowd density and limited repositioning once the course is active.

logistics.parking: Unknown; assume no useful nearby parking unless official race-day parking is announced.
logistics.transit: Normal Montjuic access includes funicular and buses, but race-day changes are unknown.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Needs Barcelona municipal/Tour closure map and finish-area perimeter map.

crowdRisk: high: opening stage, near final climb and Olympic Stadium finish.
bathroomFoodProximity: Unknown on race day; nearby Montjuic venues may have facilities in normal conditions but may be inaccessible behind barriers.
escapeRoute: Prefer walking away from the stadium toward Poble-sec or Placa d'Espanya after official reopening; do not rely on crossing the course immediately after last team.
safetyAssessment: Use only official spectator areas or broad sidewalks behind barriers; avoid any apex/corner position where team cars or riders track close to the curb.

timing.best_arrival_window: 4-5 hours before first start if targeting a close-in final sector; exact official advice pending.
timing.race_day_risk: High because finish-adjacent access is not yet confirmed.
